item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:woman","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"Link the birth-capable BODY to members of the defined bodily kind; as rendered, birth merely can happen inside an unspecified body, so it does not distinguish women, and the adequacy flag should be lossy until repaired."}
